search_tool_catalog: search the tool catalog for tools matching a natural language query like deploy docker app
select_exact_tools: use select:tool_name syntax to load exact tool schemas by name from the catalog
execute_tool_search: execute a tool search query with a max results limit to find matching tool schemas
review_match_tools_scoring: review the ToolSearchTool _match_tools method to understand the token overlap and keyword scoring algorithm
summarize_tokenize_function: summarize the _tokenize function that extracts lowercase alphanumeric tokens from text using regex
